body:
No API design or tooling issues found. This is the initial release of `@azure/arm-horizondb` (v`1.0.0-beta.1`) targeting API version `2026-01-20-preview`. Package version, context file user-agent string, and CHANGELOG all consistently reflect `1.0.0-beta.1`; no alpha versions were detected. The public API surface has no naming anomalies, no inappropriate `unknown` or `void` return types, and all referenced symbols are properly exported.


</details>

## Next Steps to Merge
Only failed checks and required actions are listed below.

- 🔄 **pnpm-lock conflict**: The PR has a merge conflict (`mergeable_state: dirty`), likely in `pnpm-lock.yaml`. Follow the [conflict guide](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/blob/main/documentation/resolve-pnpm-lock-merge-conflict.md) to resolve this before merging.
